hero.title: The professor who trains future dentists takes care of your child's smile today
hero.subtitle: Pediatric dentistry with science, warmth, and 25+ years of dedication

about.title: Prof. Dr. Marcia Goedert de Oliveira
about.subtitle: Caring for those who care
about.p1: For over 25 years, Prof. Dr. Marcia has devoted her career to two complementary purposes: caring for children's smiles in Blumenau and training the dentists who will care for the next generations.
about.p2: Holding a PhD in Pediatric Dentistry from UNESP Araraquara — one of Brazil's most respected dental schools — she brings the same scientific precision to each appointment that she takes to the classroom at FURB, where she is a professor in the Department of Dentistry and in the Master's Program in Public Health.
about.p3: Her integrative approach sees each child as unique: beyond dental treatment, she considers nutrition, habits, breathing, and emotional development. That's why families trust her across generations.

services.title: Specialties
services.subtitle: Complete care from the first tooth to an adult smile

odontopediatria.name: Pediatric Dentistry
odontopediatria.description: Specialized care from babies to young adults, with a playful and welcoming approach that transforms dental visits into positive experiences.
odontopediatria.detail: Every child has their own pace. We respect that.

ortodontia.name: Preventive Orthodontics
ortodontia.description: Early intervention to guide bone and tooth growth, preventing bigger issues in the future. Interceptive orthodontics for children and teenagers.
ortodontia.detail: Preventing is simpler — and gentler — than correcting.

invisalign.name: Invisalign
invisalign.description: Clear aligners for teens and adults. Discreet, comfortable treatment with predictable results. Dr. Marcia is a certified Invisalign Doctor.

integrativa.name: Integrative Dentistry
integrativa.description: A comprehensive view of oral health that considers the whole patient: nutrition, breathing, oral habits, and emotional development, beyond dental treatment.
integrativa.detail: The mouth says a lot about overall health.

pcd.name: Special Needs Care
pcd.description: Humanized and adapted care for patients with disabilities. Trained team, welcoming environment, and specific protocols for each need.

impact.phrase: Every smile deserves science and warmth

timeline.title: A story of dedication
timeline.subtitle: From university to the clinic, every step built the professional who cares for your child
